seoTitle: Millgrove vs Milltown — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Millgrove and Milltown. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Millgrove and Milltown.
heading: Millgrove vs Milltown — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Millgrove, Victoria and Milltown, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Milltown has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Millgrove (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Millgrove or Milltown safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Millgrove has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Milltown scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Millgrove scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Milltown scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Millgrove or Milltown?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Milltown has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
